temporal_description: (00:00-00:07) In a dimly lit, grimy basement, a shirtless boxer lies exhausted on a black medical table. His face is sweaty and his mouth is open. A single bare bulb hangs over him, casting a harsh light. An older man in a suit stands to the left, holding a fedora. In the background, another man in a white shirt appears to be preparing medical equipment, while a third man in a black shirt leans over the boxer, seemingly checking on him. (Storyline: This opening shot establishes the setting and introduces the central character, a boxer, in a state of physical distress after a fight. The presence of other men suggests a post-fight medical check or recovery session.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: Faint, ambient room tone.)
